$comment: Slide deck content contract. Ghost deck test: reading only the titles in order must tell the full argument. Every title is a full declarative assertion, never a topic label. One evidence shape per slide.

audience.$comment: Who is in the room and the venue: live keynote, investor 1:1, or async share link.

slides.$comment: Decks of 12+ slides need a chapter divider every 4-6 slides and at least one quote or metrics slide. Never more than 5 consecutive content slides.

eyebrow.$comment: Stable cross-slide section label. Must never restate the title in different words.

title.$comment: A page-unique declarative claim, e.g. 'Q3 revenue grew 23% because enterprise deals closed 2x faster'.

items.$comment: 3-5 supporting items; each fits one line. A slide with fewer than 3 items and no chart merges into a neighbor.

cap.$comment: Why this slide matters: a tradeoff, boundary, next step, or insight the visual cannot say. Never restates the title or the diagram.
